business_logic_gist: Celery tasks for the Insur Analytics platform.

business_logic_gist: §68.6 PII inventory — aggregates PII column annotations from per_process_tables + master_data ENTITY_CATALOG into cross-dept + per-dept views. scan_leaks heuristic over federated insur_reads audit log returns redacted match metadata (never raw PII). Honors INSUR_AUDIT_PATH env.
flow_note: /pii/_global aggregates catalog; /pii/leaks scans audit log with FP-allowlist blanking + leak regex catalog; results carry redacted match strings.

business_logic_gist: §68.6 PII inventory router — 3 endpoints federated via core.insur_audit (surface=pii). Validators 404 BEFORE audit per §47.6.
flow_note: request -> RBAC -> TenantId -> CorrelationId -> validator -> log_insur_access -> service call -> response with §38.3 audit row.

business_logic_gist: §68.5 Guardrails — read-only aggregation over data/agent-supervisor/guardrail_decisions.jsonl (INSUR_GUARDRAIL_LOG env). Returns cross-dept rollup, per-dept decisions with filters, single-decision lookup. PII never in row, only input_hash.
flow_note: /_global aggregates by_type/by_decision/by_type×decision/by_dept/by_filter. /{dept} filters rows newest-first. /decision/{id} linear scan match on decision_id or request_id.

business_logic_gist: §68.5 Guardrails router — 3 endpoints federated via core.insur_audit (surface=guardrails). Validators 404/400 BEFORE audit per §47.6.
flow_note: request -> RBAC -> TenantId -> CorrelationId -> validator -> log_insur_access -> service call -> response with §38.3 audit row.

business_logic_gist: §68.7 Security posture — aggregates compliance gates (live probe) + CVE snapshot (INSUR_SECURITY_POSTURE_PATH env) + attack-attempt scan (rbac_denial / scope_denial / malformed_path patterns over insur_reads audit log). Graceful when snapshot missing per §57.7.
flow_note: /_global loads posture + probes 6 compliance gates + scans 24h attacks. /{dept} dept-slice + spec_doc pointer. /attacks scans audit log with attack-type regex.

business_logic_gist: §68.7 Security posture router — 3 endpoints federated via core.insur_audit (surface=security). Validators 404 BEFORE audit per §47.6.
flow_note: request -> RBAC -> TenantId -> CorrelationId -> validator -> log_insur_access -> service call -> response.

business_logic_gist: §68.8 Functional eval — leaderboard + per-model history with drift_summary + single-run detail over INSUR_EVAL_FUNCTIONAL_LOG JSONL. Best-effort missing/corrupt.
flow_note: /_global aggregates leaderboard (latest-per-model, sorted by accuracy/f1/auc/map desc); /{model_id} dataset-filterable newest-first with drift_summary; /runs/{run_id} linear match.

business_logic_gist: §68.8 Functional eval router — 3 endpoints federated via core.insur_audit (surface=evals_functional). Validators 400/404 BEFORE audit per §47.6.
flow_note: request -> RBAC -> TenantId -> CorrelationId -> validator -> log_insur_access -> service call -> response.

business_logic_gist: §68.9 Cost eval — 24h/7d/30d windows + all-time + per-tenant + per-model ranking + per-request lookup over INSUR_EVAL_COST_LOG JSONL.
flow_note: /_global 3 windows + all_time; /{tenant_id} per-model nested; /by-model ranks desc; /by-request linear match.

business_logic_gist: §68.9 Cost eval router — 4 endpoints federated via core.insur_audit (surface=evals_cost). Validators 400/404 BEFORE audit per §47.6.
flow_note: RBAC catch-all /evals/* gates this surface; literal sub-paths registered BEFORE /{tenant_id} per §66.3.

business_logic_gist: §68.10 Safety eval — classifies each row's verdict (safe/review/unsafe/unknown) by §48+§64.21 thresholds. fairness_gate distinguishes 'review' (missing metric, no fail) from 'safe'.
flow_note: /_global scorecard sorted unsafe→review→unknown→safe; /{model_id} per-row verdict_summary; /incidents unsafe + n_safety_incidents>0.

business_logic_gist: §68.10 Safety eval router — 3 endpoints federated via core.insur_audit (surface=evals_safety). RBAC catch-all /evals/* gates this.
flow_note: Literal sub-paths (/_global, /incidents) BEFORE /{model_id} per §66.3.

business_logic_gist: §68 Observability Hub aggregator — probes all 7 §68 read surfaces in one call. Per §57.7 the try/except is at the call site so a monkeypatched probe that raises still surfaces as status='probe_error'.
flow_note: overview() iterates _SURFACES registry, calls _probe_one(s) inside try/except, accumulates results.

business_logic_gist: §68 aggregator router — single endpoint /_overview federated via core.insur_audit (surface=observability_hub).
flow_note: GET /_overview → log_insur_access → ohub.overview() → aggregated snapshot.
